title.blue: Custom AI sales automation, no new SaaS to learn or maintain

hero.subtitle: Lead scoring, AI outreach, and CRM automations delivered with minimal disruption, by Vitor Pepicon (Top 1% on Upwork, 100+ projects, 20+ yrs experience)

trustedBy.suffix: ...and other smart teams who hate manual work.

services.title: Everything You Need to Sell Without Losing Your Mind
services.subtitle: Bespoke automations, crafted to fit your flow, not force a new one

features.label: AI-Powered Lead Scoring
features.description: Instantly spot who's ready to buy and who's just browsing. We go beyond basic rules, using AI to analyze your specific data like website behaviour, email engagement, and enriched firmographics to identify prospects matching your ideal customer profile. This custom model learns over time, ensuring your sales team consistently focuses its energy on the highest-potential leads, directly surfaced within your CRM.

features.label: Personalized Outreach on Autopilot
features.description: Custom messages that actually get replies, automatically. Trigger relevant, context-aware outreach based on lead scores, specific actions (like demo requests or content downloads), or enrichment data. We can leverage AI (like GPT) trained on your value proposition to draft initial messages or follow-ups that resonate, moving beyond generic templates to achieve higher engagement. No spam, just timely, personalized communication that drives conversions.

features.label: CRM & Workflow Automation
features.description: Follow-ups, lead routing, stage updates, all handled without lifting a finger.

features.label: Real-Time Data Enrichment
features.description: Enrich your leads with fresh, actionable info from multiple sources, automatically. As leads enter your pipeline or progress through stages, we automatically pull in missing details, like company size, funding status, tech stack, or direct contact info, from reliable B2B databases and online sources. This eliminates manual research, ensures your data is accurate and complete, and provides your team with the crucial context needed for effective scoring and personalized outreach, right within your CRM.

If you're looking for someone you won't have to worry about and he will solve everything for you, you definitely won't find a better consultant.

items.question: Can you integrate with my current CRM and tools?
items.answer: Absolutely. Works best if your tools play nice with Zapier, Make, or have an API, but we can handle the weird ones too.

items.question: Do I need technical expertise to work with you?
items.answer: Zero. You focus on selling, I'll handle the nerdy stuff behind the curtain.

items.question: How quickly can I expect results?
items.answer: Most teams see more replies, better lead quality, and fewer headaches within the first month.

items.question: What if I'm not even sure what I need?
items.answer: No problem: bring your chaos to the email exchange and I'll bring the clarity.

items.question: Is this just another AI tool?
items.answer: Nope. This isn't some off-the-shelf tool. It's hands-on consulting plus custom-built automation tailored to your process, tools, and goals.

items.question: Do I need to commit to the monthly plan?
items.answer: Not at all. You can stop after getting your Custom AI Sales Engine built and run it yourself. The monthly plan is optional for teams who want ongoing optimization and support.

about.title: Hey, I'm Vitor Pepicon 👋
content: So, for about 20 years, I've been deep in the tech trenches, messing with everything from trading platforms to AI and smart contracts.

And the biggest thing I've learned is that it's never about just grabbing the fanciest tool off the shelf. It's really about getting a setup that actually clicks with how you already work. And then I see too many sales teams struggling, thinking they had to copy the big guys and just hire more people to fix problems. That's why I believe smart automations, built to fit your systems, are the right answer. Keeps you agile, lean, and making the most of current AI.

If you feel like you live in your inbox, drowning in manual tasks instead of actually selling, we should talk. When done right, this kind of automation frees you up to focus on closing deals and talking to the right leads. Let the tech handle the repetitive stuff that eats up your time.
Let's chat and see what that would look like with your current process and tools. We can sketch out some ideas and give you a clear plan. No pressure, no fluff.

footer.tagline: Outsell the Big Guys, With Less Hustle, More Flow.
